visa_types.name: Business/Workshop/Training/Exhibition
visa_types.documents_required:
According to the Personal Information Protection Law of the People’s Republic of China and other applicable laws and regulations to protect your personal information, VFS Global must obtain the consent from you for the processing of your personal data and proceed with your visa application. Please download, print, fill, sign and submit the consent form along with your visa application form, without which we will not be able to proceed with the application lodgment. Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/tha/apply-visa)
Participants of MICE industry  (Meeting, Incentives, Convention, Exhibitions) supported by TCEP (Thailand Convention Exhibition Bureau) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4cS8v7OoVG84rTm2yKxRR0/dfa5dab2bd23bbbb80ab02a5b3265868/MICE-industry-jan-2022.pdf)
Travelling to Thailand on a business purpose  eg. meeting, exhibition (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/P4VcqvImzOtdDRs9oQPJJ/cc04eb48c7172b188ae59858c6e51ffb/business-purpose-jan-2022.pdf)
Travelling to Thailand on a business purpose  eg. meeting, exhibition (Multiple Entry) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7AYavxvwSIxVOM5HWJt3qf/2eb169fa387b101cce01ecf5d800824a/multiple-entry-jan-2022.pdf)
Attending workshop training or seminar organized by International Organization (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/t3upQ7kBD5nFP5ImezaRI/93d9037b863be42ef09dc06085bc022c/international-organization-jan-2022.pdf)
Participants in Thailand International Cooperation Agency (TICA) programme (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/P1UvH6TgabBzEALV6NCkI/0d416d5fdacf3b899e5851cb8954b0ff/international-cooperation-jan-2022.pdf)
Attending a meeting with Thai agency or to participate an event organized by Thai Government (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4wOb9plD5EjjUdq7uPj2YD/9f8314b85a8d94071ef05b6e23ddcf77/participate-an-event-jan-2022.pdf)
Personal Data Collection Consent Form （Signature Required） (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4tRTOiu9tM4msBAYwwvY3d/a1ba5af5b0bbed2ecbbd73af16b2cc20/consent-form-version-5-apr-2022.pdf)
Declaration Form (Signature Required) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7aCuCIAZPRNBiwckV7A1Vj/1646975124df5f24cdf270003f32aaa8/visa-application-statement-jan-2022.pdf)
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Business/Workshop/Training/Exhibition]
The RMB visa fee shall be calculated according to the consular exchange rate. If there is any change, no notice will be given.                               
When applying for a Thai visa, the applicant needs to pay a service fee of 89 yuan (including tax) in RMB.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
If the purpose of travelling is Business you need to apply Business/Workshop/Training/Exhibition Visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If the purpose of travelling is Business you need to apply Business/Workshop/Training/Exhibition Visa.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Business/Workshop/Training/Exhibition]
The RMB visa fee shall be calculated according to the consular exchange rate. If there is any change, no notice will be given.                               
When applying for a Thai visa, the applicant needs to pay a service fee of 89 yuan (including tax) in RMB.

## Documents Required
According to the Personal Information Protection Law of the People’s Republic of China and other applicable laws and regulations to protect your personal information, VFS Global must obtain the consent from you for the processing of your personal data and proceed with your visa application. Please download, print, fill, sign and submit the consent form along with your visa application form, without which we will not be able to proceed with the application lodgment. Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/tha/apply-visa)
Participants of MICE industry  (Meeting, Incentives, Convention, Exhibitions) supported by TCEP (Thailand Convention Exhibition Bureau) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4cS8v7OoVG84rTm2yKxRR0/dfa5dab2bd23bbbb80ab02a5b3265868/MICE-industry-jan-2022.pdf)
Travelling to Thailand on a business purpose  eg. meeting, exhibition (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/P4VcqvImzOtdDRs9oQPJJ/cc04eb48c7172b188ae59858c6e51ffb/business-purpose-jan-2022.pdf)
Travelling to Thailand on a business purpose  eg. meeting, exhibition (Multiple Entry) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7AYavxvwSIxVOM5HWJt3qf/2eb169fa387b101cce01ecf5d800824a/multiple-entry-jan-2022.pdf)
Attending workshop training or seminar organized by International Organization (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/t3upQ7kBD5nFP5ImezaRI/93d9037b863be42ef09dc06085bc022c/international-organization-jan-2022.pdf)
Participants in Thailand International Cooperation Agency (TICA) programme (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/P1UvH6TgabBzEALV6NCkI/0d416d5fdacf3b899e5851cb8954b0ff/international-cooperation-jan-2022.pdf)
Attending a meeting with Thai agency or to participate an event organized by Thai Government (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4wOb9plD5EjjUdq7uPj2YD/9f8314b85a8d94071ef05b6e23ddcf77/participate-an-event-jan-2022.pdf)
Personal Data Collection Consent Form （Signature Required） (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4tRTOiu9tM4msBAYwwvY3d/a1ba5af5b0bbed2ecbbd73af16b2cc20/consent-form-version-5-apr-2022.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
If the purpose of travelling is Work you need to apply Work Visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If the purpose of travelling is Work you need to apply Work Visa.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Work ]
The RMB visa fee shall be calculated according to the consular exchange rate. If there is any change, no notice will be given.                               
When applying for a Thai visa, the applicant needs to pay a service fee of 89 yuan (including tax) in RMB.

## Documents Required
According to the Personal Information Protection Law of the People’s Republic of China and other applicable laws and regulations to protect your personal information, VFS Global must obtain the consent from you for the processing of your personal data and proceed with your visa application. Please download, print, fill, sign and submit the consent form along with your visa application form, without which we will not be able to proceed with the application lodgment. Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/tha/apply-visa)
